name: Ham and Corn Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 (20 oz.) can of whole kernel corn - drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Make white sauce: Melt margarine in a saucepan. Blend in flour slowly, scraping the bottom of the pan. Remove from heat and gradually add milk, stirring constantly. Return to low heat and stir until the sauce boils. Add salt and remove from heat.
2. Stir in mustard, pepper, and Worcestershire sauce into the white sauce.
3. Add corn, onion, green pepper, and ham to the sauce mixture.
4. Pour the mixture into a nonstick casserole dish.
5. Top with breadcrumbs and grated cheese.
6. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes or until bubbly.
Recipe: Ham And Corn Casserole
